name: Royal Family
description: The British royals and other monarchs past and present

questions.q: What breed of dog was famously kept by Queen Elizabeth II throughout her life?

source.notes: Pembroke Welsh Corgis specifically; the Queen owned more than 30 during her reign.

questions.q: Who did Prince William marry in April 2011 at Westminster Abbey?

source.notes: Made Princess of Wales in 2022 following the Queen's death.

questions.q: What is the name of the royal family's Scottish Highland estate?

source.notes: Privately owned by the sovereign; Queen Elizabeth II died there in September 2022.

questions.q: How many children did Princess Diana have?

source.notes: Princes William and Harry.

questions.q: Princes William and Harry both attended which prestigious English boarding school?

source.notes: Eton College has educated 20 British prime ministers.

questions.q: What is the primary London residence of the British monarch?

source.notes: Has served as the official royal residence since 1837.

questions.q: Who was Queen Elizabeth II's husband for 73 years until his death in 2021?

source.notes: Philip, Duke of Edinburgh; married Elizabeth in 1947.

questions.q: Approximately how many rooms are there in Buckingham Palace?

source.notes: Including 19 State rooms, 52 Royal and guest bedrooms, 188 staff bedrooms.

questions.q: In what year did a major fire break out at Windsor Castle, which Queen Elizabeth II described as part of her 'annus horribilis'?

source.notes: November 20, 1992; destroyed more than 100 rooms.

questions.q: King Edward VIII abdicated in 1936 in order to marry which American divorcée?

source.notes: They married in France in June 1937 and lived in exile as the Duke and Duchess of Windsor.

questions.q: Prince Harry married which American actress in May 2018?

source.notes: Met while Markle was filming the legal drama 'Suits'.

questions.q: Who attracted widespread press attention for a dramatic 'pretzel' hat at the 2011 royal wedding of William and Kate?

source.notes: The Philip Treacy hat later sold at auction for £81,100 for UNICEF.

questions.q: Queen Elizabeth II was born on April 21 — but her official 'birthday' parade was traditionally held in which month?

source.notes: Trooping the Colour is held in early June to give better parade weather.

questions.q: What color hair did Queen Elizabeth I of England famously have?

source.notes: Often depicted with striking red/ginger hair in portraits.

questions.q: In which city did Princess Diana die in a car crash in August 1997?

source.notes: Crashed in the Pont de l'Alma road tunnel on August 31, 1997.

questions.q: What is the official name of the British royal family's current royal house?

source.notes: Renamed from Saxe-Coburg and Gotha in 1917 during WWI.

questions.q: Apart from the United Kingdom, Queen Elizabeth II was head of state of how many other Commonwealth realms at the time of her death?

source.notes: 14 other realms at her death including Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Jamaica, Papua New Guinea, and others. Barbados removed her in 2021.

questions.q: What is the maiden name of Queen Camilla (wife of King Charles III)?

source.notes: Camilla Rosemary Shand; later Camilla Parker Bowles after first marriage.

questions.q: Until 1947, the British monarch also held which imperial title, later dropped?

source.notes: Queen Victoria took the title in 1876; dropped when India gained independence.

questions.q: Which church did King Henry VIII establish in the 1530s after breaking with Rome?

source.notes: Break with Rome formalized by the Act of Supremacy 1534.

questions.q: Mary, Queen of Scots, ruler from 1542, belonged to which royal house?

source.notes: Executed by order of her cousin Elizabeth I in 1587.

questions.q: Besides Scotland, Mary Queen of Scots was briefly queen consort of which other country through her first marriage?

source.notes: Married Francis II of France in 1558; he died 1560.
